title: Follow the Cup

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"under there" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Arrange 4 cups upside down where the switch user can see them.
2. Hide the prize under a cup and mix them up.
3. Point to the first cup; if they press "next", move to the next.
4. If they press "under there!", lift that cup.
5. If they find the prize, they get to keep it!

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through cups to find the hidden chocolate coin!
